# Sprint 0.1 Environment Setup

**Sprint:** Sprint 0. Platform Foundation
**Objective:** Establish the foundation for the IoT and Remote Patient Monitoring data platform.

## Description
Set up the development environment, including Snowflake, cloud object storage, and necessary tools. Configure access control, roles, and secure views.

## Deliverable
Configured development environment
